transcript: Speaker A: The best way to improve your speaking is to practice every day, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person. I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. It's fast, easy, and without stress. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Let's practice together every day, and you'll see how quickly your English improves. Hi, I'm Loora. Imagine you're here in a café, ready to order in English. It can feel a little scary, right? But with me, you can practice every situation before it happens. I'll show you how to order your coffee, how to ask simple questions, and how to feel confident speaking to anyone. No books, no stress - just natural conversation, like talking to a friend. And the more you practice with me, the easier it becomes when you're out in the real world. So, let's start practicing together today, and in 3 weeks you will speak with confidence.

summary: An AI avatar named Loora introduces herself as an AI English tutor that helps users practice speaking English anytime, anywhere. She explains how the app provides instant feedback on pronunciation and simulates real-world scenarios like ordering coffee in a café. The ad encourages daily practice to build confidence and improve English speaking skills within three weeks.
